metadata.provenance: Adapted from tests/fixtures/page-render/sequencing-rollout-learner-page.json (Sprint 65 sequencing rollout). Preserves PRISM activity_interaction_type=sequencing and ordering.{canonical_order,learner_display_order,learner_display_order_strategy,shuffle_seed_key}. Corroborated by Sprint 59 Educational Psychology production audit A3 (activity_interaction_type=sequencing; unordered process cards).

overview.body: Practice sequencing authored events from earliest to latest.

learning_purpose.body: Develop chronological ordering skill using an authoritative PRISM sequencing activity.

knowledge_summary.body: Learners rearrange candidate events. The correct sequence is authored as ordering.canonical_order; the initial learner presentation uses ordering.learner_display_order.

activities.title: Put these in order
activities.learner_task:
1. Read the chronology guidance.
2. Put these in order from earliest to latest.
3. Check your sequence against the verification criteria.
activities.expected_output: Events ordered from earliest to latest.
activities.activity_preamble: You will sequence three authored events.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Decide which event must come first, then arrange the remaining events relative to it.

materials.title: Chronology guidance
materials.body: Read each event carefully. Arrange them from earliest to latest.

materials.title: Sequence check
materials.body:
- Earliest event is first
- Latest event is last
- Middle event sits between them

activities.title: Discuss implications
activities.learner_task:
1. Read the discussion prompt.
2. Note one implication.
3. Verify your note against the checklist.
activities.expected_output: One implication with a short example.

materials.title: Discussion prompt
materials.body: Discuss one implication of the chronology.
